ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number assigned by the court */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court handling the case */,
  "is_search_warrant" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the case involves a search warrant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the case was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "court_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the court */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the court */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Application for Search/Seizure Warrant, Order on Motion to Unseal Document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document type (e.g., court documents, evidence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the document is associated with */,
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "confidentiality_level" TEXT /* Confidentiality level of the document (e.g., public, confidential, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attorney, paralegal, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the case was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, in progress, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the note is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., general, meeting, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the version is associated with */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., filed, assigned, closed) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "related_document" TEXT /* Related document ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_events_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the search is associated with */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was conducted */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location of the search */,
  "search_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the search */,
  "search_result" TEXT /* Result of the search */,
  "warrant_number" TEXT /* Warrant number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_searches_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the participant is involved in */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of the participant (e.g., plaintiff, defendant, witness) */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., attorney, witness, judge) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_participants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the decision is associated with */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of the decision (e.g., ruling, order) */,
  "decision_text" TEXT /* Text of the decision */,
  "related_document" TEXT /* Related document ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_decisions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the log entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "related_document" TEXT /* Related document ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the case as favorite */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case marked as favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the case was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_favorites_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being shared */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the case */,
  "shared_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the case was shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the case was shared */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Message accompanying the share */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the share expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_shares_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_shares_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_shares_shared_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the attachment is associated with */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_attachments_uploaded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_attachments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_attachments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_tags_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the reminder is associated with */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Description of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reminders_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
